data.content: Shipment complete: ship-11b1 merged into main, pushed to origin/main as 6f321b41 (range b0885338..6f321b41). Pre-push hook lint-staged-size.sh ran clean. The 'sync error: 1 active lease(s)' message is the same advisory hook seen on prior shipments — does not block push. The artifact (remote_main per autopilot profile) is now live.
